name: video-pipeline
description: AI video production pipeline: generate storyboards from scripts and batch-produce illustration images using Gemini AI. Manages full project lifecycle from script input to downloadable image assets.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key with image generation access

tools.name: create_storyboard
tools.description: Generate a structured storyboard from script text. Analyzes the script and decomposes it into shot-by-shot breakdown with visual descriptions, timing, and mood annotations.

parameters.style: Video style hint (optional, default: AI科技/知识分享)

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all video projects with their status and metadata.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get full project details including storyboard shots and generated image file list.

tools.name: edit_storyboard
tools.description: Replace a project's storyboard with updated shots. Use after reviewing and modifying the auto-generated storyboard.

parameters.shots: Array of shot objects with shot_number, time_range, script_text, asset_type, image_prompt, mood, is_post_production (required)

tools.name: generate_images
tools.description: Batch generate illustration images for all shots in a project's storyboard. Skips post-production shots automatically.

tools.name: get_image_status
tools.description: Check how many images have been generated vs total shots requiring images.

tools.name: download_project
tools.description: Get project file listing with paths and download URL for retrieving all project assets.
